mechanics.excerpt: Jury-rig ging or building bow requires basic tools and takes about tnir: ty minutes_ Make an Archery Check at the end of this period: success means the bow is functional, though attacks made with suffer target number modifier equal to 8 minus the Margin of Success of the Check (to minimum of +1).
